id.description:
The id of the work.
It must be the name of the work in lowercase ASCII encoding (without any special character like accents).

category.description:
The category the work belongs to.
It must be a valid category id, hence referring to the `id` field of one of the items in the `categories.yaml` file.

composition_date.description:
The composition date of the work.
Can be either a year (e.g. `1967`) or a range of years (e.g. `1965-1967`) and can contain a revision year or year range (e.g. `1965, rev. 1967`).

date.description: The date of the last update to the file (should be automatically set when saving the file).

title.description: The title of the work in one or more languages.

main.description: The language code of the primary/display title (must be a key in `translations`).

original.description: The language code of the original title, if different from `main`.

sort.description: Ordered list of language codes indicating the sort/display priority of translations.

translations.description: Map of language code to title string.

description.description: A short description of the work (instrumentation, sub-title, etc.).

duration.description: The duration of the work in seconds.

movements.description: The list of movements or parts of the work.

duration.description: The duration of the movement in seconds.

rework_of.description:
The id of the work this work is a rework/arrangement/transcription of.
Must be a valid work `id`.

version.description: Free-text description of the version when there are multiple versions of the same work.

setting.description: The orchestral or ensemble setting of the work in standard shorthand notation (e.g. `2, 2, 2, 2 – 2, 2, 1, 0 – timp. – archi`).

dedicated.description: The dedication of the work (alias of `dedication`).

nb.description: Miscellaneous notes about the work (unpublished status, archive location, etc.). Supports Markdown links.

texts.description: Map of language code to description of the text/libretto source used in the work (e.g. `{ "hu": "In Hungarian by...", "de": "In German by..." }`).

libretto.description: Map of language code to description of the libretto source (same structure as `texts`, used for operatic/vocal works).

synopsis.description: A short synopsis of the work (for stage/operatic works).

cast.description: The list of vocal roles in the work.

voice.description: The voice type (e.g. soprano, mezzo-soprano, tenor, baritone, bass, bass-baritone).

world_premiere.description: Information about the world premiere of the work.

location.description: Venue and/or city of the world premiere.

credits.description: List of credits (conductor, director, cast, etc.).

film_directors.description: List of directors of the film this work was composed for.

film_producers.description: List of producers of the film this work was composed for.

choreography.description: Name of the choreographer (for ballet/dance works).

publications.description: List of publications (sheet music) of the work.

publisher_id.description: The id of the publisher. Must be a valid publisher id from `publishers.yaml`.

type.description: The type of score. If omitted, the publication covers all score types.

audios.description: List of audio excerpts available for this work. Use `null` as a placeholder when audio exists but hasn't been digitized yet.
